scores.notes: Significant OCR errors throughout including misspellings (Relerenze, Depatch, Reciptent, Cbarge, Welght, Shipmenta, Descriptionf, Additlonal, etc.), garbled text in addresses and names, incorrect date formats (6661-90-90), malformed numbers (K.59, LSOE), and incomplete table entries. Table structure is partially preserved but many cells contain corrupted data. Document appears complete but accuracy is severely compromised.
